---
title: "09. 地形、九地与拓扑约束"
subtitle: "Terrain, Topology, and State-Constrained Positioning"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 9
categories: [sunzi, cultural, omega]
description: "How 地形 and 九地 make space itself part of the action graph, rewriting movement, retreat, commitment, and tactical meaning."
---

**Chapters:** 地形第十, 九地第十一  
**Omega Directions:** `modular tower inverse limit`, `dynamical systems`, `fold operator`

{{< include articles/category_09_terrain_topology_state_constrained_positioning.md >}}

---

[Back to Sunzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
